target_definition.description: Binary label indicating whether the environmental conditions in the future window [t+3, t+7] constitute a high outbreak risk window for red rot of sugarcane. Label = 1 if ALL three sub-conditions are met across that 5-day window; else 0.

C1_temperature_suitability.rule: mean(T2M over t+3 to t+7) >= 29.0 AND mean(T2M over t+3 to t+7) <= 33.0
C1_temperature_suitability.rationale: Optimum pathogen growth range 29-31 C (SMRA validated).

C2_humidity_accumulation.rationale: RH > 85% required for severe outbreak; 82% used as leading indicator.

C3_rainfall_accumulation.rule: sum(PRECTOTCORR over t+3 to t+7) >= 20 mm
C3_rainfall_accumulation.rationale: Rain-splash dispersal of conidia requires multi-day rainfall accumulation.

target_definition.calculation_logic: For each row at date t: 1. Extract T2M, RH2M, PRECTOTCORR for dates t+3, t+4, t+5, t+6, t+7. 2. Compute: temp_ok = (mean(T2M[t+3:t+7]) >= 29.0) AND (mean(T2M[t+3:t+7]) <= 33.0). 3. Compute: humidity_ok = mean(RH2M[t+3:t+7]) >= 82. 4. Compute: rain_ok = sum(PRECTOTCORR[t+3:t+7]) >= 20. 5. outbreak_risk = 1 if (temp_ok AND humidity_ok AND rain_ok) else 0. NOTE: The last 7 rows of the dataset must be dropped (no valid label exists).
target_definition.class_balance_note: Expected class imbalance: ~20-35 % positive during monsoon months (July-Oct), ~2-5 % outside monsoon. Use stratified sampling or class weights during training.

temporal_features.calculation: T2M_MIN at date t-15  [PRIMARY LAG — SMRA R2 0.82-0.87]

domain_features.name: monsoon_flag
domain_features.definition: Binary indicator of whether the current date falls in the monsoon season.
domain_features.purpose: Red rot outbreaks are biologically constrained to monsoon season. This hard gate prevents false positives in winter/spring.

domain_features.name: humidity_streak_days
domain_features.definition: Number of consecutive days up to and including t where RH2M >= 82 %.
domain_features.calculation_logic: For each date t: count backwards from t the number of consecutive days where RH2M >= 82. Reset to 0 on any day where RH2M < 82.
domain_features.purpose: Captures sustained high-humidity accumulation. A streak of 7+ days is the validated threshold for severe outbreak risk.

domain_features.name: rainfall_streak_days
domain_features.definition: Number of consecutive rainy days (PRECTOTCORR > 5 mm) up to t.
domain_features.calculation_logic: For each date t: count backwards from t the number of consecutive days where PRECTOTCORR > 5. Reset to 0 on any dry day.
domain_features.purpose: Continuous rainfall drives rain-splash dispersal of conidia. 5+ consecutive rainy days is an early warning signal.

domain_features.name: temperature_suitability_flag
domain_features.definition: Binary flag — 1 if today's T2M is within the optimal pathogen growth range.
domain_features.purpose: Encodes the domain threshold (29-33 deg C) as an explicit binary signal for the model, avoiding reliance on linear interpolation across a wide range.

domain_features.name: temp_suitable_days_14d
domain_features.definition: Count of days in the past 14 days where temperature_suitability_flag == 1.
domain_features.calculation_logic: rolling sum of temperature_suitability_flag over window=14 days ending at t
domain_features.purpose: Captures how many of the past 14 days were biologically conducive. Aligns with the 14-day accumulation window validated across all papers.

domain_features.name: risk_accumulation_index
domain_features.definition: A composite 0–3 score representing concurrent environmental risk. Each of three conditions contributes 1 point.
domain_features.calculation_logic: risk_accumulation_index = (1 if RH2M_roll7 >= 82 else 0) + (1 if PREC_sum7 >= 15 else 0) + (1 if T2M_roll7 >= 29.0 AND T2M_roll7 <= 33.0 else 0). Range: 0 (no risk) to 3 (all conditions met).
domain_features.purpose: Combines three independent risk signals into a single composite index. Score of 3 = all conditions simultaneously met over 7-day window. Reduces dimensionality and captures joint risk better than individual features.

domain_features.name: high_risk_composite_flag
domain_features.definition: Binary flag — 1 if risk_accumulation_index == 3 AND monsoon_flag == 1.
domain_features.purpose: This is the single strongest early warning signal. Combines domain season gate + all three environmental conditions. Directly maps to early warning rule EW-06 from domain_rules.json.

domain_features.name: lag15_risk_flag
domain_features.definition: Binary flag based on conditions 15 days ago — the primary SMRA-validated lag.
domain_features.calculation_logic: lag15_risk_flag = 1 if (T2M_MIN_lag15 >= 24.0 AND RH2M_lag15 >= 79.0 AND month(t-15) in [6,7,8,9,10]) else 0
domain_features.purpose: Encodes the 15-day lag relationship (SMRA R² 0.82-0.87) as a direct binary feature. High T2M_MIN and RH2M 15 days ago is the strongest leading indicator of current risk.

domain_features.name: month
domain_features.purpose: Explicit seasonality signal. Allows model to learn month-specific risk profiles without relying solely on rolling features.

domain_features.name: day_of_year
domain_features.purpose: Continuous seasonality encoding. Captures intra-month temporal gradients that month alone cannot (e.g., 2nd fortnight of August being peak risk).

agronomic_features.name: variety_susceptibility
agronomic_features.description: Encoded susceptibility score of currently planted variety.
agronomic_features.note: Use 0.7 (high susceptibility) as conservative default if unavailable.

agronomic_features.name: crop_age_months
agronomic_features.description: Age of standing crop in months from planting.
agronomic_features.note: Grand growth phase (months 4-8) has highest susceptibility. Default = 6.

agronomic_features.name: infected_sett_flag
agronomic_features.description: Whether infected setts were used in planting.
agronomic_features.note: Default = 0 (unknown/assumed clean). Set to 1 in high-risk survey areas.

temporal_rules.feature_cutoff: All features at row t use ONLY data from dates <= t. No future data is used in any feature computation.
temporal_rules.label_window: Label for row t is computed using data from dates t+3 to t+7 inclusive.
temporal_rules.lag_alignment: Lag features (e.g., T2M_MIN_lag15) use value at t-15. This is past data and is leakage-free.
temporal_rules.rolling_alignment: All rolling windows use a closed-right window ending at t (e.g., df['T2M'].rolling(14).mean() at row t uses rows t-13 to t).
drop_rules: Drop first 28 rows (insufficient history for rolling_28 features).
Drop last 7 rows (no valid label window exists).
temporal_rules.chronological_integrity: Dataset must remain sorted by date ascending. No shuffling permitted at any stage.

example.train: 2005-01-01 to 2018-12-31  (14 years, ~4,975 rows after warmup/tail drop)

split_strategy.reasoning: Time-based splitting is the ONLY valid strategy for time-series data. Random splits would allow future weather patterns to leak into training, inflating evaluation metrics. The train set covers 14 years of monsoon cycles (2005-2018) for sufficient class balance. Validation (2019-2021) tunes thresholds and hyperparameters. Test (2022-2024) is a true holdout — never seen during training or tuning. No data from the validation or test period may influence feature normalization or scaling (fit scaler on train only, transform validation and test).
split_strategy.gap_between_splits: None required — daily data with no missing dates.
split_strategy.scaler_rule: Fit MinMaxScaler or StandardScaler on TRAIN set only. Apply to validation and test.

dataset_schema.description: Each row represents one calendar day. Features encode weather history up to and including that day (no leakage). outbreak_risk encodes whether the next 3-7 days will be a high-risk window. Agronomic columns default to conservative placeholders if field data unavailable.

implementation_notes.step1: Load raw CSV, parse date column, sort ascending.
implementation_notes.step2: Compute all rolling and lag features using pandas rolling() and shift().
implementation_notes.step3: Compute all domain features in order (streak, flag, index, composite).
implementation_notes.step4: Compute target label using future-window logic (shift(-3) to shift(-7)).
implementation_notes.step5: Drop warmup rows (first 28) and tail rows (last 7).
implementation_notes.step7: Fit scaler on train features only; transform all splits.
implementation_notes.missing_value_handling: Forward-fill gaps <= 3 days. Drop rows with > 3 consecutive missing days.
implementation_notes.class_weight_recommendation: Use class_weight='balanced' in model or compute pos_weight = n_negative / n_positive for XGBoost/LGBM.
